changes.detail: All five mandatory fields present and valid. work_id=WP2-LAYER-B-LAYER-C-TECHNICAL-CLOSURE, branch=wp2/layer-b-layer-c-technical-closure, risk_level=HIGH, execution_model=TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH, change_type=MIXED. HIGH is correct: work package touches Intelligence Core (narrative_report_compiler_v1.py is an analytics-layer assembler; validator_v2.py is the LLM output guard; orchestrator wiring at line 2214 is directly in the production analysis path). MIXED is correct: new Pydantic contracts are CONTENT; changes to compiler signature, orchestrator wiring, and validator are BEHAVIOUR. TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH required for HIGH risk.

changes.detail: All six project authority documents referenced in the prompt exist at the stated paths. The SOP (docs/AUTOMATION_BUS_SOP_v1.3.1.md in prompt; authoritative location docs/governance/AUTOMATION_BUS_SOP_v1.3.1.md per CLAUDE.md) is operationally active. No duplicate authority sources detected. Advisory: docs/architecture/ directory does not yet exist — Cursor must create it for Task 1 ADR. Not a stop condition.

ReportV1 is a typed Pydantic model (extra='forbid'). top_findings: List[ReportTopFindingV1] at line 81. root_cause_v1: Optional[RootCauseV1] = None at line 85. intervention_annotations_v1: Optional[InterventionAnnotationsV1] = None at line 86. All three fields the NarrativePayloadV1 must carry are present and typed. No stop condition.

RootCauseV1 is a typed Pydantic model (extra='forbid') with version: str and findings: List[RootCauseFindingV1]. RootCauseFindingV1 at lines 48-55 contains signal_id, primary_metric, signal_state, signal_confidence, hypotheses: List[RootCauseHypothesisV1]. Each RootCauseHypothesisV1 at lines 34-45 contains hypothesis_id — this is the field the validator must check for invented hypothesis rejection. Typed contract is present and sufficient.
InterventionAnnotationsV1 contract exists and is imported in report_v1.py at line 11. NarrativePayloadV1 can import it directly without duplication.
narrative_payload_v1.py does not exist. Task 1 creates a new file. No collision or duplication risk.

compile_narrative_report_v1() signature uses keyword-only arguments: analysis_id (str), meta (Optional[Mapping[str, Any]]=None), insight_graph (Optional[Mapping[str, Any]]=None), idl_bundle (Any=None), intervention_annotations_v1 (Optional[InterventionAnnotationsV1]=None). All parameters are keyword-only and optional except analysis_id. Adding narrative_payload_v1: Optional[NarrativePayloadV1] = None as a new keyword-only optional parameter will not break the existing call site at orchestrator.py:2214-2220, which passes named arguments. No stop condition.

compile_narrative_report_v1() is called at lines 2214-2220 with named kwargs: analysis_id=analysis_id, meta=meta, insight_graph=insight_graph.model_dump(), idl_bundle=idl_bundle, intervention_annotations_v1=intervention_annotations_v1. AnalysisDTO is assembled at lines 2245-2265. insight_graph.model_dump() is called at line 2142 and stored in meta['insight_graph'] — the same insight_graph object carries report_v1, accessible via hasattr check. NarrativePayloadV1 builder can be inserted between line 2213 and line 2214. AnalysisDTO at line 2245-2265 does NOT include top_findings or root_cause_v1 as fields — Path B confirmed, no AnalysisDTO restructuring needed.

_clinician_heads() reads cr = analysis_result.get('clinician_report_v1') at line 105. analysis_result is AnalysisDTO.model_dump() from run_golden_panel (per audit §8 and direct harness read). AnalysisDTO has no clinician_report_v1 field (confirmed in results.py). Therefore cr is always {}. Fix must follow pattern in test_clinician_report_runtime_alignment.py:23-36 — extract meta.insight_graph.report_v1 from analysis_result and call compile_clinician_report_v1() directly. This is a tooling fix only. Not a BEHAVIOUR-class change.

Three existing guards confirmed: schema validation at line 126-130, numeric invention at lines 143-154, red flag referencing at lines 170-176. Three gaps confirmed absent: (A) no lead finding preservation check — no code checks that insight signal IDs centre the prompt's top_findings[0].signal_id; (B) no hypothesis invention check — no code checks hypothesis_id values against root_cause_v1.findings[*].hypotheses[*].hypothesis_id; (C) no prohibited claim detection — no regex for 'diagnoses', 'confirms', 'rules out', etc. All three additions are pure validation layer extensions — no pipeline, SSOT, or analytical engine changes required. Evidence-referencing pass-through at lines 156-167 confirmed lenient (pass branch at line 167 allows unmatched free text — noted as advisory, not a stop condition).

selectVisibleIdlRecords() at lines 11-17 filters only r.enabled_for_frontend === true. Missing: r.frontend_allowed_term !== 'clinical_only'. InterpretationFrontendAllowedTermV1 type at analysis.ts:217 = 'phenotype_allowed' | 'clinical_only'. frontend_allowed_term is a typed field on InterpretationDisplayRecordV1 at analysis.ts:234. Fix is a single additional filter clause. No backend IDL YAML change required. No stop condition.

No stop conditions triggered.

No .codex/, AGENTS.md, or IDE artefact creation expected.

stage_2a.advisory: docs/architecture/ directory does not exist. Cursor must create it when writing ADR_WP2_layer_b_layer_c_contract_path_b.md for Task 1. Standard directory creation — not a stop condition.

intelligence_core_components_identified: backend/core/pipeline/orchestrator.py (NarrativePayloadV1 construction and wiring at lines 2214-2220)
stage_2b.behavioural_surface_area: Three bounded behavioural surfaces: (1) compile_narrative_report_v1() gains an optional typed payload parameter — when provided, the compiler prefers typed payload over raw insight_graph dict for Layer B truth. This changes the _input path_ not the analytical logic. (2) validate_llm_output_v2() gains three new rejection guards — lead finding, hypothesis invention, prohibited claims. These are additive restrictions; Gemini is not yet activated so no current output is rejected. (3) Orchestrator wiring at lines 2214-2220 — NarrativePayloadV1 is constructed from existing insight_graph.report_v1 and passed to the compiler. No new analytical reasoning is introduced.
stage_2b.expected_output_changes: NONE for current runtime. NarrativePayloadV1 is a new contract layer derived deterministically from existing ReportV1. The compiler's output shape (NarrativeReportV1) is unchanged. The validator adds rejection paths that are not triggered in the current deterministic mock path (Gemini is not active). Proving harness fix will make primary_concern_head, key_findings_head, top_hypothesis_line_head non-empty in fingerprints — this is a correction of previously blank values, not an analytical change.
regression_targets: backend/tests/unit/test_clinician_report_runtime_alignment.py — must continue passing (compiler called directly, not affected by orchestrator wiring)
backend/tests/unit/test_report_compiler_v1.py — must continue passing (no change to report compiler logic)
backend/tests/regression/test_obs2_questionnaire_exercise_unknown_regression.py — must continue passing (unrelated to Layer B/C changes)
frontend/tests/components/InterpretationPatternsSection.test.tsx — will need updating (add phenotype_allowed record, add clinical_only exclusion assertion)
Any golden panel fixture tests — narrative_report_v1 output shape is unchanged; asserting non-empty compile output should remain stable
stage_2b.determinism_preserved: YES — NarrativePayloadV1 builder is deterministic (derives fields from existing typed ReportV1 with no new reasoning). Compiler preference for typed payload over raw dict produces same section assembly since it is reading the same underlying data. Validator additions are pure regex/set membership checks.
stage_2b.no_scope_creep: Non-goals explicitly prohibit Sprint 3 authoring, Gemini activation, SSOT changes, Knowledge Bus changes, and AnalysisDTO restructuring. Scope is bounded to 8 numbered tasks with explicit file lists and a forbidden files registry.
determinism_risks: Task 3 compiler preference rule ('prefer typed payload for Layer B truth') must not alter section assembly logic — it should change the source object accessed, not the assembly outcome. Cursor must confirm compiled NarrativeReportV1 is field-equivalent whether using typed payload or raw dict path.
Task 5 validator new checks must not reject any currently passing deterministic mock output — guards should only fire on Gemini-produced content. Cursor must confirm mock path is unaffected.

Task 6 harness fix changes fingerprint artefacts (primary_concern_head will become non-empty) — this is intentional correction, not regression. latest_fingerprints.json and PROVING_REPORT.md must be updated by the harness run, not manually.
